category_sources: Official GitHub README describes RustNet as per-process network monitoring for the terminal.
source_facts.description identifies rustnet as a cross-platform network monitoring terminal UI with deep packet inspection.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the display name RustNet.
docs_sources: Official USAGE.md and INSTALL.md in the repository provide dedicated usage and installation documentation.
Official repository README documents quick start, controls, filtering, and features.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/domcyrus/rustnet, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official README documents per-process attribution, DPI, filtering, and cross-platform support.
source_facts.description identifies network monitoring, terminal UI, and deep packet inspection.
